Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown.MarkdownWriter

Packages that use MarkdownWriter
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
Markdown serializer and parser support for Apache Juneau.

  • Uses of MarkdownWriter in org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown

    Method
    Description
    MarkdownWriter

    Writes a blank line.
    MarkdownWriter

    Writes bold text.
    MarkdownWriter
    MarkdownWriter.bulletItem(int depth, String text)
    Writes a Markdown bulleted list item.
    MarkdownWriter
    MarkdownWriter.code(String text)
    Writes text wrapped in backticks (inline code).

    MarkdownSerializerSession.getMarkdownWriter(SerializerPipe out)
    Gets or creates a MarkdownWriter from the given pipe.
    MarkdownWriter
    MarkdownWriter.heading(int level, String text)
    Writes a Markdown heading at the specified level.
    MarkdownWriter
    MarkdownWriter.horizontalRule()
    Writes a Markdown horizontal rule.
    MarkdownWriter
    MarkdownWriter.italic(String text)
    Writes italic text.
    MarkdownWriter
    MarkdownWriter.tableHeader(String... columns)
    Writes a Markdown table header row.
    MarkdownWriter
    MarkdownWriter.tableRow(String... values)
    Writes a Markdown table data row.
    MarkdownWriter
    MarkdownWriter.tableSeparator(int numColumns)
    Writes a Markdown table separator row.
    MarkdownWriter
    MarkdownWriter.text(String text)
    Writes plain text with Markdown escaping.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown with parameters of type MarkdownWriter
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    MarkdownSerializerSession.serializeAnything(MarkdownWriter w, Object o, ClassMeta<?> eType, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta)
    Main serialization dispatch method.
    protected void
    MarkdownSerializerSession.serializeBeanMap(MarkdownWriter w, BeanMap<?> bm, ClassMeta<?> eType, ClassMeta<?> aType)
    Serializes a bean as a 2-column key/value Markdown table.
    protected void
    MarkdownDocSerializerSession.serializeBeanWithHeadings(MarkdownWriter w, BeanMap<?> bm, int level)
    Serializes a bean in document mode, using headings to structure nested objects.
    protected void
    MarkdownSerializerSession.serializeCollection(MarkdownWriter w, Collection<?> c, ClassMeta<?> eType, ClassMeta<?> cm)
    Serializes a collection as either a multi-column table (uniform beans/maps) or a bulleted list.
    protected void
    MarkdownSerializerSession.serializeMap(MarkdownWriter w, Map<?,?> m, ClassMeta<?> cm)
    Serializes a Map as a 2-column key/value Markdown table.
